_comment: Map domain → creative filename(s) for per-site creative assignment.
_comment2: Use exact domain (e.g. 'tomsguide.com') or partial match (e.g. 'toms').
_comment3: 'default' is used when no domain matches.
_comment4: Filenames must exist inside input_images/desktop/ or input_images/mobile/ (or input_images/ root).
